title: [InstCombine] Fix a cycle when folding fneg(select) with scalable vector types

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary emphasizes NaN handling but doesn't cover infinity and zero constant folding combinations in fixed vectors
Issue title mentions fneg(select) pattern but summary and existing tests don't cover constant condition select folding before fneg

Summary emphasizes scalable vector handling, but this tests fixed vector constant folding through shufflevector. The patch's element-by-element folding for FixedVectorType applies here, which is a different optimization path than the scalable vector splat focus.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x double> @fneg_fixed_vector_shufflevector_constant() {
#0:
  %v = shufflevector <4 x double> { 1.000000, 2.000000, 3.000000, 4.000000 }, <4 x double> { 1.000000, 2.000000, 3.000000, 4.000000 }, 3, 2, 1, 0
  %r = fneg <4 x double> %v
  ret <4 x double> %r
}
=>
define <4 x double> @fneg_fixed_vector_shufflevector_constant() {
#0:
  ret <4 x double> { -4.000000, -3.000000, -2.000000, -1.000000 }
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
